source_doc:
@Maker_of_Things
Is there any bruising or swelling? If it’s swelling then let the practice know and keep an eye on it.
Assuming she took it from the veins around the elbow, theres a chance she went too deep and hit the back wall of the vein, and an underlying tendon then bruised it on the way out. All depends on technique and equipment. I could never get the hang of a fixed needle draw but was a deft hand at a butterfly draw, you could be much kinder.
Hope it’s eased now.

@tempusfelix
Yeah, from my elbow. It is still sore, but getting better. No bruising or bleeding though.

@Maker_of_Things
Good. She may well have been too deep so remember if they’re not urgent, you can often ask for a specific practitioner if your surgery allows it. For example I like the sister at mine, she’s so smooth.
instruction: You are a professional Indonesian translator, tasked with providing translations suitable for use in Indonesian (ind_Latn). Your goal is to accurately convey the meaning and nuances of the original text while adhering to Indonesian grammar and vocabulary and ensuring that the translation is natural. The original text is user-generated content from a social media platform. Do not reproduce spelling mistakes. Reproduce marks of expressiveness that communicate meaningful intent (e.g. enthusiasm through capitalisation or elongation) in a way that is natural in Indonesian. Copy URLs and user handles directly rather than translating them. However, translate hashtags as appropriate for the translation to be natural for social media text. Follow the punctuation of the source text as best as possible. Additional punctuation should be added only if not doing so would seriously alter the comprehension of the text. Translate text in an informal style, like close friends talking, even if it changes the original tone. Produce only the Indonesian translation, without any additional explanations or commentary. Maintain the HTML formatting of the original source text. Please translate the following text into Indonesian (ind_Latn):
hypo_0:
@Maker_of_Things
Ada memar atau bengkak nggak? Kalau bengkak, kasih tahu kliniknya ya dan tetap dipantau.
Kalau dia ngambil darahnya dari pembuluh vena di sekitar siku, ada kemungkinan dia masuknya terlalu dalam dan kena dinding belakang vena, lalu tendon di bawahnya jadi bikin memar pas jarumnya keluar. Semua tergantung teknik dan alatnya. Aku sendiri nggak pernah benar-benar bisa pakai jarum tetap buat ambil darah, tapi lumayan jago kalau pakai jarum kupu-kupu, itu bisa jauh lebih nyaman.
Semoga sekarang udah mendingan.

@tempusfelix
Iya, dari siku. Masih nyeri sih, tapi udah membaik. Nggak ada memar atau pendarahan juga.

@Maker_of_Things
Bagus. Bisa jadi dia memang terlalu dalam, jadi ingat ya kalau nggak mendesak, kamu sering bisa minta petugas tertentu kalau klinikmu memang mengizinkan. Misalnya aku suka perawat senior di tempatku, tangannya halus banget.

source_doc:
Traction meets fashion: The best weatherproof trainers for rain-slicked pavements

The Cloudhorizon Waterproof feels purpose-built for the stop-start rhythm of winter commuting. Its lightweight waterproof upper keeps your feet dry without adding bulk, and the shoe's smooth rocker shape helps you roll forward easily, even when you're layered up and carrying heavy loads.

Underfoot, Helion foam creates a cushioned bounce that softens long walks between stations, while the grippy rubber outsole keeps things steady on wet steps and shiny tiles. The pared-back design gives it a polished, modern look, ideal if you prefer a trainer that handles lousy weather subtly, without shouting its technical credentials.

Bagian atasnya yang ringan dan kedap air menjaga kaki tetap kering tanpa menambah kesan bulky, sementara bentuk rocker sepatu yang mulus membantu Anda melangkah maju dengan mudah, bahkan saat mengenakan lapisan pakaian tebal dan membawa beban berat.

source_doc:
Ironing the lightweight green corduroy for my first try at the Sachi's Studio Newsboy Cap pattern. I don't know how I feel about the recommendation to use interfacing but it probably does want something to stiffen and thicken it a bit.
#millinery

Sachi's newsboy cap pattern advises to cut the crown pieces diagonal to the weave ("on the bias") to allow more stretch around the circumference but that will make the corduroy rows run aslant, where I prefer them vertical.
We shall see. This is the test cookie to get a feel for the pattern. I like corduroy for texture but green wouldn't be my first choice, and this fabric is lightweight enough that I should add a layer, whether interfacing or what-have-you from the stash.

On a second look, my fabric isn't corduroy at all, it's just velvet, so I can cut at 45° to the fabric weave like Sachi suggests in the Newsboy Cap pattern and it won't look strange.
#millinery

#topi

Pola newsboy cap dari Sachi nyaranin buat motong bagian crown secara diagonal terhadap tenunan kain ("on the bias") supaya lebih melar mengelilingi lingkar kepala, tapi itu bakal bikin garis-garis korduroinya jadi miring, padahal aku lebih suka vertikal.
Kita lihat aja nanti. Ini proyek percobaan buat ngerasain polanya. Aku suka korduroi karena teksturnya, tapi hijau bukan pilihan pertamaku, dan kain ini cukup tipis jadi aku harus nambah satu lapisan, entah interfacing atau apa pun yang ada di stok kainku.

Pas kulihat lagi, kainku ternyata bukan korduroi sama sekali, tapi beludru, jadi aku bisa motong di sudut 45° terhadap tenunan kain kayak saran Sachi di pola Newsboy Cap dan tampilannya nggak bakal aneh.

Pola newsboy cap dari Sachi nyaranin supaya bagian-bagian mahkotanya dipotong diagonal terhadap arah tenunan kain ("on the bias") biar lebih melar di sekeliling lingkarannya, tapi itu bakal bikin garis-garis korduroinya jadi miring, padahal aku lebih suka kalau arahnya vertikal.
Kita lihat aja nanti. Ini versi uji coba buat ngerasain polanya. Aku suka korduroi karena teksturnya, tapi hijau bukan warna yang bakal jadi pilihan pertamaku, dan kain ini cukup ringan jadi sebaiknya aku tambahin satu lapisan, entah interfacing atau apa pun yang ada di stok kainku.

Setelah kulihat lagi, ternyata kainku bukan korduroi sama sekali, cuma beludru, jadi aku bisa motongnya di sudut 45° dari arah tenunan kain seperti saran Sachi di pola Newsboy Cap, dan hasilnya nggak bakal kelihatan aneh.
#modiste

source_doc:
I am waiting, professor.
Well, what do you see in my hand?
I see the hand of a of a charming young man.
Within the next few months Lord Arthur will go on a voyage.
Naturally, his honeymoon.
And lose a relative.
Well, we all lose relatives.
Sometimes I think they were created for the purpose.
Can you tell us any more?
No, Lady Clementine.
That's all I can say.

source_doc:
@la Isn't rule #1 of machining that if you haven't faced it off, it's not square or flat?

@azonenberg yes, of course, but I *did* mean to face it off. I just had my tool zero set wrong.
Because I assumed that it was roughtly flat.
I'm making an extra part today. I have the stock. And if I don't it will bug me to no end. Plus, during test fitting the bearing I broke the glue holding the part on my plate, so I would have to indicate it back in anyways, which I don't wanna dooooo, so.....

@la I know the feeling.
Had a similar problem when working on my house where literally every datum you might think of using was wrong.
I had a contractor frame a door frame plumb and square. Had to rip out a couple of studs after he left because the door needed to be like a degree off level in order to be flush with the floor and not floating in the air on one side.
Another (partial height) wall has each stud carefully cut to length because no two are the same size... The floor isn't flat so to make the countertop level you need the wall to be a parallelogram rather than a rectangle

@azonenberg iya, tentu aja, tapi aku *memang* niat nge-face itu. Cuma tool zero-ku kepasang salah.
Soalnya aku ngira permukaannya udah lumayan rata.
Hari ini aku bikin part ekstra. Stoknya ada. Dan kalau nggak, ini bakal bikin aku kepikiran terus. Plus, pas test fitting bearing-nya aku malah ngerusak lem yang nahan part itu di plate-ku, jadi mau nggak mau aku harus indicate ulang juga, dan aku nggak mauuuuu, jadi.....

@la Aku paham banget rasanya.
Pernah kena masalah mirip pas ngerjain rumahku, di mana literally semua datum yang kepikiran buat dipakai ternyata salah.
Aku pernah nyuruh kontraktor bikin kusen pintu tegak lurus dan siku. Setelah dia pergi, aku malah harus bongkar beberapa stud karena pintunya harus melenceng sekitar satu derajat dari level biar rata sama lantai dan nggak ngambang di satu sisi.

Apple, dearie.
Oh.
Thank you.
It should be noted by all in attendance that Mother Gothel was not Rapunzel's real mother.
That's right.
I was kidnapped by Mother Gothel when I was just a baby.
And why was Rapunzel kidnapped Mr. Jones?
Because of her magic hair?
Yes.
Which keeps Mother Gothel.
The fairest of them all.
Wow.

Laverne, you you forget about moving.
I want you to call down.
I want to reserve the auditorium for tomorrow.
Then call every doctor in this building and tell them to be there for a rally.
We are going to fight this.
The great Kirk Corporation.
Well, it's an uphill battle against these corporations.
But I'm with you all the way.
It's like my daddy used to say, never give up a pediatrics office without a fight.
Your daddy said that?
Well, actually, he said about a whiskey still.
But I'm adapting it to the present situation.

source_doc:
@afewbugs I have seen this too, I do worry that new members might not find such groups in the real world now as they are less likely to be on old fashioned social media. For instance someone was trying to give away two pedal cycles in need of repair and couldn't get any interest through Facebook. A few years ago they wouldn't have lasted ten minutes before someone claimed them. I have one and I am gutted that I wasn't able to take the second. Similarly, litter picking and community gardens.

@hicksy2 @afewbugs I have more luck shifting things through Facebook marketplace these days than I do with Gumtree any more, and I can't face eBay for things too big to post. Possibly it depends a lot on where you are though, especially with bikes!

@lnr @hicksy2 Marketplace is a big one keeping me on Facebook too. I used to think it was to keep in touch with friends but I barely see any posts from my actual friends anymore, so now it's mostly marketplace, local groups and the fact most local businesses and even the Library only seem to have their opening times, special events etc on Facebook
instruction: You are a professional Indonesian translator, tasked with providing translations suitable for use in Indonesian (ind_Latn). Your goal is to accurately convey the meaning and nuances of the original text while adhering to Indonesian grammar and vocabulary and ensuring that the translation is natural. The original text is user-generated content from a social media platform. Do not reproduce spelling mistakes. Reproduce marks of expressiveness that communicate meaningful intent (e.g. enthusiasm through capitalisation or elongation) in a way that is natural in Indonesian. Copy URLs and user handles directly rather than translating them. However, translate hashtags as appropriate for the translation to be natural for social media text. Follow the punctuation of the source text as best as possible. Additional punctuation should be added only if not doing so would seriously alter the comprehension of the text. Translate text in an informal style, like close friends talking, even if it changes the original tone. Produce only the Indonesian translation, without any additional explanations or commentary. Maintain the HTML formatting of the original source text. Please translate the following text into Indonesian (ind_Latn):
hypo_0:
@afewbugs Aku juga pernah lihat ini, aku agak khawatir anggota baru sekarang mungkin nggak bakal nemu kelompok kayak gitu di dunia nyata soalnya mereka makin kecil kemungkinan pakai media sosial jadul. Misalnya, ada yang coba ngasih dua sepeda kayuh yang butuh diperbaiki dan nggak dapat minat sama sekali lewat Facebook. Beberapa tahun lalu, belum sampai sepuluh menit juga pasti sudah ada yang ngambil. Aku punya satu dan sedih banget nggak bisa ambil yang satunya lagi. Sama juga dengan kegiatan pungut sampah dan kebun komunitas.

@hicksy2 @afewbugs Sekarang aku lebih sering berhasil ngejual atau mindahin barang lewat Facebook Marketplace daripada Gumtree, dan aku udah nggak sanggup ngurus eBay buat barang yang kegedean buat dikirim. Mungkin juga sih banyak tergantung kamu tinggal di mana, apalagi buat sepeda!

@lnr @hicksy2 Marketplace juga salah satu alasan besar yang bikin aku tetap di Facebook. source_doc:
and it's not a bad film — it's a spectacular-looking one in spots — but it is also a film entirely made out of other, better and more thematically cohesive films. so it's 2001 and the three-body problem and arrival and wall-e a little bit, but it's also Quips Sexyman Saves The World Part XVII and ultimately just not that lot

while watching i wondered why the earth needed to be in peril, and if the other two members of the multicultural crew dying to leave the White Man in charge was some kind of an anti-woke statement; but in light of some of the book author andy weir's 'most media literate libertarian' comments about how star trek should be just about spaceships going pew-pew, at least to him the answer is yes to the latter and 'fascism' to the former

@esvrld I read the book a little while back and I may have given him too much credit, especially given his recent decision to open his mouth, but I took the death of the international crew to strand the white boy as an understanding that his second book failed because he is not any good at writing people interacting with each other and his only skill is creating clever little puzzles for his self-insert to solve in complete isolation. Giving him an alien buddy was a good move because it opens the possibility of character interaction without requiring it to resemble the way humans relate to one another
instruction: You are a professional Indonesian translator, tasked with providing translations suitable for use in Indonesian (ind_Latn). Your goal is to accurately convey the meaning and nuances of the original text while adhering to Indonesian grammar and vocabulary and ensuring that the translation is natural. The original text is user-generated content from a social media platform. Do not reproduce spelling mistakes. Reproduce marks of expressiveness that communicate meaningful intent (e.g. enthusiasm through capitalisation or elongation) in a way that is natural in Indonesian. Copy URLs and user handles directly rather than translating them. However, translate hashtags as appropriate for the translation to be natural for social media text. Follow the punctuation of the source text as best as possible. Additional punctuation should be added only if not doing so would seriously alter the comprehension of the text. Translate text in an informal style, like close friends talking, even if it changes the original tone. Produce only the Indonesian translation, without any additional explanations or commentary. Maintain the HTML formatting of the original source text. Please translate the following text into Indonesian (ind_Latn):
hypo_0:
dan ini bukan film yang jelek — di beberapa bagian tampilannya spektakuler banget — tapi ini juga film yang sepenuhnya dibangun dari film-film lain yang lebih bagus dan lebih padu secara tema. jadi ini tuh 2001 dan The Three-Body Problem dan Arrival dan sedikit Wall-E, tapi juga Quips Sexyman Saves The World Bagian XVII dan pada akhirnya ya nggak banyak juga

waktu nonton aku sempat mikir kenapa bumi harus ada dalam bahaya, dan apakah dua anggota kru multikultural lainnya mati cuma buat ninggalin Si Pria Kulit Putih tetap pegang kendali itu semacam pernyataan anti-woke; tapi ngelihat beberapa komentar penulis bukunya, andy weir, yang vibes-nya “libertarian paling melek media” soal gimana star trek mestinya cuma soal kapal luar angkasa yang pew-pew, setidaknya buat dia jawaban buat yang kedua itu iya dan buat yang pertama itu “fasisme”

@esvrld Aku baca bukunya beberapa waktu lalu dan mungkin aku ngasih dia terlalu banyak kredit, apalagi setelah keputusan terbarunya buat buka mulut, tapi aku nangkep kematian kru internasional itu sebagai cara buat ngedamparin si cowok kulit putih itu dengan pemahaman bahwa buku keduanya gagal karena dia memang nggak jago nulis orang-orang yang saling berinteraksi dan satu-satunya keahliannya cuma bikin teka-teki kecil yang pintar buat diselesaiin sama self-insert-nya dalam isolasi total. Ngasih dia teman alien itu langkah yang bagus karena itu membuka kemungkinan adanya interaksi karakter tanpa harus bikin itu mirip sama cara manusia berhubungan satu sama lain

dan ini bukan film yang jelek — di beberapa bagian visualnya spektakuler banget — tapi ini juga film yang sepenuhnya dibangun dari film-film lain yang lebih bagus dan lebih padu secara tema. jadi ini 2001, The Three-Body Problem, Arrival, dan sedikit Wall-E, tapi juga Quips Sexyman Saves The World Part XVII, dan ujung-ujungnya ya nggak seberapa juga

waktu nonton aku sempat mikir kenapa bumi harus ada dalam bahaya, dan apakah dua anggota lain dari kru multikultural itu mati cuma buat ninggalin Si Pria Kulit Putih tetap pegang kendali itu semacam pernyataan anti-woke; tapi kalau ngelihat komentar-komentar penulis bukunya, andy weir, yang “libertarian paling melek media”, soal gimana star trek mestinya cuma tentang kapal luar angkasa yang pew-pew, setidaknya buat dia jawaban buat yang kedua itu iya, dan buat yang pertama itu “fasisme”

@esvrld Aku baca bukunya beberapa waktu lalu dan mungkin aku ngasih dia terlalu banyak kredit, apalagi setelah keputusan terbarunya buat buka mulut, tapi aku nangkep kematian kru internasional itu sebagai cara buat mendamparkan si cowok kulit putih itu, dengan pemahaman bahwa buku keduanya gagal karena dia memang nggak jago nulis orang yang berinteraksi satu sama lain, dan satu-satunya keahliannya cuma bikin teka-teki kecil yang pintar buat self-insert-nya pecahkan dalam isolasi total. Ngasih dia teman alien itu langkah yang bagus karena itu membuka kemungkinan adanya interaksi karakter tanpa harus bikin itu mirip sama cara manusia berhubungan satu sama lain

source_doc:
Progress after a while off. I got the sewing machine out to do the bill and a crown seam. Half the crown sewn plus the bill, resting atop the paper form made from the pattern. I had to rip and re-sew the machine stitch because I pinned along instead of across the seam and went off track. I might re-do the bill if I want a little more depth.
#millinery

Eight crown panels and two bill panels assembled into three pieces and pinned for general shape. Sachi's Studio Newsboy Cap pattern in green velvet. Mostly machine stitched.
The pattern calls for topstitching along the seams of the crown panels, which might suggest either matching or contrasting thread.
#millinery

Top view before I sew the crown halves together. Reviewing the how-to video. I see Sachi is using a few tiny spring clips during sewing instead of pinning the whole seam.

A bit of a messy join on the eight panels coming together at the peak of the newsboy cap, so I am thinking a larger button may be in order to disguise the seams.

Crown fully pieced, with cloth covered.button at peak. Raw edges loosely tucked under. Seams neither pressed nor topstitched.
#millinery
instruction: You are a professional Indonesian translator, tasked with providing translations suitable for use in Indonesian (ind_Latn). Your goal is to accurately convey the meaning and nuances of the original text while adhering to Indonesian grammar and vocabulary and ensuring that the translation is natural. The original text is user-generated content from a social media platform. Do not reproduce spelling mistakes. Reproduce marks of expressiveness that communicate meaningful intent (e.g. enthusiasm through capitalisation or elongation) in a way that is natural in Indonesian. Copy URLs and user handles directly rather than translating them. However, translate hashtags as appropriate for the translation to be natural for social media text. Follow the punctuation of the source text as best as possible. Additional punctuation should be added only if not doing so would seriously alter the comprehension of the text. Translate text in an informal style, like close friends talking, even if it changes the original tone. Produce only the Indonesian translation, without any additional explanations or commentary. hypo_0:
Kemajuan setelah sempat berhenti. Aku ngeluarin mesin jahit buat ngerjain visor dan satu jahitan di mahkota. Separuh mahkota sudah dijahit plus visornya, ditaruh di atas bentuk kertas yang dibuat dari pola. Aku harus bongkar dan jahit ulang jahitan mesin karena aku nyemat jarum pentul searah, bukannya melintang di jahitan, jadi jalurnya melenceng. Mungkin visornya bakal aku bikin ulang kalau mau sedikit lebih dalam.
#topi

Delapan panel mahkota dan dua panel visor dirangkai jadi tiga bagian lalu disemat buat dapetin bentuk umumnya. Pola topi newsboy Sachi's Studio dari beludru hijau. Kebanyakan dijahit mesin.
Polanya minta topstitch di sepanjang jahitan panel-panel mahkota, yang mungkin berarti pakai benang senada atau kontras.
#topi

Tampilan atas sebelum aku jahit dua belahan mahkota jadi satu. Lagi ngulang video tutorialnya. Aku lihat Sachi pakai beberapa klip pegas kecil waktu menjahit, bukan nyemat seluruh jahitannya dengan jarum pentul.

Sambungannya agak berantakan pas delapan panel ketemu di puncak topi newsboy, jadi aku kepikiran mungkin perlu kancing yang lebih besar buat nyamarin jahitannya.

Mahkota sudah tersusun penuh, dengan kancing berlapis kain di puncaknya. Tepi-tepi mentahnya diselipkan longgar ke bawah. Jahitannya belum dipres ataupun diberi topstitch.
#topi

source_doc:
A couple of weeks ago, my boyfriend and I did pottery.
I mean, actual pottery.
And it's now time to collect our masterpieces.
So I'm in the office today, and it is literally just a 20 minute walk away from the office.
But the one time I went, I obviously used my phone map because I'd never been in that area before.
So let's hope I can remember some orientation skills and use this thing.
instruction: You are a professional Indonesian translator, tasked with providing translations suitable for use in Indonesian (ind_Latn). Your goal is to accurately convey the meaning and nuances of the original text while adhering to Indonesian grammar and vocabulary and ensuring that the translation is natural. The original text is automatically transcribed from spoken language and can contain errors. Maintain the flow and colloquial style of the speaker in the translation. Do not include non-linguistic sounds (e.g. laughter, groans, hesitation sounds, etc.), but do include interjections. If a word is interrupted, either guess the full word if possible or otherwise omit it. Keep foreign words as they are when translating. Produce only the Indonesian translation, without any additional explanations or commentary. Output the text such that each sentence is on a separate line. Please translate the following text into Indonesian (ind_Latn):
hypo_0:
Beberapa minggu yang lalu, aku dan pacarku ikut kelas pottery.
Maksudku, bikin keramik beneran.
Dan sekarang waktunya ambil hasil karya masterpiece kami.
Jadi hari ini aku lagi di kantor, dan tempatnya benar-benar cuma 20 menit jalan kaki dari kantor.
Tapi waktu aku ke sana sekali itu, jelas aku pakai map di ponselku karena sebelumnya aku belum pernah ke area itu.
Jadi semoga aku masih ingat sedikit kemampuan orientasi arah dan bisa pakai benda ini.

source_doc:
I just had a very nice #dream that I made friends with Lee Chaeyeon. I just started talking to her nand the next thing I know, I have stayed over her house (like when the French kidnapped me for Christmas) and she is telling me to go up stairs and "shuffle up a little bit" (her English was generally excellent) by which she meant "tidy up a little bit" to show her mom we were ready to eat.
She comes upstairs to "shuffle up" her room and starts making gestures to explain what she means ...
1/

(she was always so excited to see me in this dream) because I was taking my coat off instead of "shuffling up."
Then she indicates this little piece of paper and says she has left me an autograph but in return she wants this little trading card I made in second grade of "50 Spikes," a sonic knock-off, obviously with more spikes. (This card actually exists IRL BTW). I start explaining to her what it is and if she really wants it (she did) I at least needed a picture of her holding it.
2/

Partly because I would miss it, but also, otherwise no one would believe me that she had wanted this thing from me.
It was then I realized we still didn't have each others' phone numbers.
3/3

hypo_0:
Aku baru aja ngalamin #mimpi yang bagus banget, aku jadi temenan sama Lee Chaeyeon. Aku cuma mulai ngobrol sama dia terus tiba-tiba tahu-tahu aku nginep di rumahnya (kayak waktu orang Prancis “menculik” aku pas Natal) dan dia nyuruh aku naik ke atas lalu “rapiin dikit” (bahasa Inggrisnya dia sebenarnya bagus banget), yang dia maksud itu “beresin dikit” biar nunjukin ke ibunya kalau kami udah siap makan.
Dia naik ke atas buat “rapiin” kamarnya dan mulai bikin gestur buat ngejelasin maksudnya ...
1/

(dia selalu heboh banget tiap ketemu aku di mimpi ini) karena aku malah ngelepas mantelku bukannya “rapiin dikit.”
Terus dia nunjukin secarik kertas kecil ini dan bilang dia ninggalin tanda tangan buat aku, tapi sebagai gantinya dia mau kartu trading kecil yang aku bikin waktu kelas dua tentang “50 Spikes,” tiruan Sonic, jelas dengan duri yang lebih banyak. (Kartu ini beneran ada IRL BTW). Aku mulai ngejelasin ke dia itu benda apa dan kalau dia beneran mau itu (dia mau) setidaknya aku butuh foto dia lagi megang kartu itu.
2/

Sebagian karena aku bakal kangen sama benda itu, tapi juga karena kalau nggak, nggak bakal ada yang percaya kalau dia pengin benda itu dari aku.
Baru saat itu aku sadar kami bahkan masih belum saling punya nomor telepon.
3/3

source_doc:
Tonight in #MMRPG! My back finally shuts up enough that I can GM again as the heroes continue their search for the missing girl Cammie. Vega the Digital Dragon surprises a trio of mischievous scamps who snuck into her arcade in the middle of the night but one of them recognizes her as a town superhero and they end up having a heartwarming moment geeking out over video games. Unfortunately, the moment is interrupted by somebody or something landing on the roof of the arcade... 1/?

Vega goes to investigate and finds Dr. Vesper, in his monstrous bat form that the press has dubbed the "Gargoyle Man," along with a harpy-like creature that Vesper describes as his "little protegee." Vesper says that they have come to introduce themselves and invite Vega to join their society of man-creature misfits that is led by "The Madame," Dr. Diana Laughton of the Laughton Institute. 2/?

Vega buys some time to get the mischievous scamps out of the arcade and call the rest of the Mythics for backup, then plays along at being interested in joining this "new family." Vesper and Harpy (who does not speak once during the interaction) lead Vega to a ship in the harbor, where the Laughton Institute appears to be packing up their things... presumably because they know they're drawing attention from Agent Carter and A.R.G.E.N.T. among others. 3/?

hypo_0:
Malam ini di #RPGMMO! Akhirnya punggungku mendingan jadi aku bisa jadi GM lagi saat para hero melanjutkan pencarian mereka buat gadis hilang bernama Cammie. Vega si Naga Digital ngagetin tiga bocah usil yang nyelinap masuk ke arkadenya tengah malam, tapi salah satu dari mereka mengenalinya sebagai superhero kota dan akhirnya mereka malah dapat momen hangat sambil fangirling/fanboying soal video game. Sayangnya, momen itu terganggu gara-gara seseorang atau sesuatu mendarat di atap arcade... 1/?

Vega pergi menyelidiki dan menemukan Dr. Vesper, dalam wujud kelelawar mengerikannya yang dijuluki pers sebagai "Manusia Gargoyle," bersama makhluk mirip harpy yang Vesper sebut sebagai "anak didik kecilnya." Vesper bilang mereka datang buat memperkenalkan diri dan mengundang Vega buat bergabung dengan kelompok orang-makhluk buangan mereka yang dipimpin oleh "Sang Madame," Dr. Diana Laughton dari Institut Laughton. 2/?

Vega mengulur waktu buat mengeluarkan bocah-bocah usil itu dari arcade dan menghubungi Mythics lainnya buat bantuan, lalu pura-pura tertarik bergabung dengan "keluarga baru" ini. Vesper dan Harpy (yang sama sekali tidak bicara selama interaksi itu) membawa Vega ke sebuah kapal di pelabuhan, tempat Institut Laughton tampaknya sedang berkemas... kemungkinan karena mereka tahu mereka mulai menarik perhatian Agent Carter dan A.R.G.E.N.T., di antara yang lain. 3/?

source_doc:
I'm doing a eekly 1hr meeting where I'm going over with a director of engineering my soap box on managing a product management organization and actually it's coming out to be a pretty good episodic thing

Topics have been
- different types of product managers and the basic skill sets in developing requirements
- how product managers ensure an ongoing cadence for an engineering team
- dealing with product managers with varying backgrounds (engineering, data analyst, operational SME, consulting etc)
what's been fun is that this Director and I worked at a previous company with product managers that I didn't manage and I'm able to reference "hey remember that person? that person was awesome and here's why."

so in various email chains and slack threads I'll forward them to said director (if he's already not in there) and be like "ok a GOOD product manager would do THIS" and a "BAD product maanger would do THAT" rememember when so and so did THIS? that was good.
instruction: You are a professional Indonesian translator, tasked with providing translations suitable for use in Indonesian (ind_Latn). Your goal is to accurately convey the meaning and nuances of the original text while adhering to Indonesian grammar and vocabulary and ensuring that the translation is natural. The original text is user-generated content from a social media platform. Do not reproduce spelling mistakes. Reproduce marks of expressiveness that communicate meaningful intent (e.g. enthusiasm through capitalisation or elongation) in a way that is natural in Indonesian. Copy URLs and user handles directly rather than translating them. However, translate hashtags as appropriate for the translation to be natural for social media text. Follow the punctuation of the source text as best as possible. Additional punctuation should be added only if not doing so would seriously alter the comprehension of the text. Translate text in an informal style, like close friends talking, even if it changes the original tone. Produce only the Indonesian translation, without any additional explanations or commentary. Maintain the HTML formatting of the original source text. Please translate the following text into Indonesian (ind_Latn):
hypo_0:
Aku lagi ngadain meeting mingguan 1 jam, ngebahas bareng seorang direktur engineering soal uneg-unegku tentang gimana ngelola organisasi product management, dan ternyata jadinya lumayan bagus sebagai semacam serial episodik

Topiknya sejauh ini
- berbagai tipe product manager dan skill dasar dalam menyusun requirement
- gimana product manager memastikan ritme kerja yang berkelanjutan buat tim engineering
- menghadapi product manager dengan latar belakang yang beragam (engineering, analis data, SME operasional, konsultan, dll)
yang seru, Direktur ini dan aku pernah kerja di perusahaan sebelumnya bareng product manager yang nggak aku kelola, jadi aku bisa bilang, "eh inget orang itu? dia keren banget dan ini alasannya."

@hacks4pancakes What do you think is actually going on?
Confused? Anxious? Executive Dysfunction? Unrealistic? Bone idle?
(I'm NOT confusing ND with idleness in my internal ontology here, but I wonder if either might be contributing...)

@hacks4pancakes @DamonHD Foe emigration at least, I can imagine myself saying “oh I’m so jealous, I would LOVE to do that” when the truth is there are internal or external reasons why I wouldn’t/couldn’t and someone offering to help me with the logistics wouldn’t change that so I politely decline.

@darryl @hacks4pancakes The grown-up way to politely decline would be "I got ahead of myself: I cannot do that for other reasons much as I'd like to", not brushing it off as a diary issue!

The fried eggs have turned to scrambled eggs.
You know what?
Considering we didn't have a spatula, it's not horrible.
Yum.
Alrighty.
It's breakfast time.
It is 904 and we're still at 100%.
To be fair, we didn't really do anything with the phone just yet.
It was just mostly sitting there in my pocket.
Also, yes, I do put the the milk in first because this way the cereal doesn't get soggy.
Unfortunately, it seems my opinion is a rather unpopular one.

source_doc:
Local stable out to cash in at Coffs with four contenders

Local trainer Noel Mayfield-Smith is hoping to have a lucrative day at Sunday's Coffs Harbour meeting with four runners stepping out for the stable on the six-race card.

The Group 1-winning horseman will start his day in the second event of the day when Ausbred Yahoo contests the Komatsu Country Boosted Benchmark 58 Handicap (1605m) with two-kilogram claiming apprentice Ella Drew taking the ride.

Racing returns to Coffs Harbour on Sunday.

Ausbred Yahoo has been racing in good form with a third placing at Kempsey three starts ago being followed by two successive seconds at Coffs Harbour, the latest when beaten by Sunday's rival Caledonian.

Mayfield-Smith links with another apprentice, three-kilogram claimer Leanne Boyd, when Never Island starts in the Insurance Advisernet Australia Pink Silks F&M Benchmark 58 Handicap (1305m).

A winner of three of her 15 starts, Never Island will carry 59.5 kilograms after Boyd's allowance. Never Island was beaten less than a length when second behind Montgomery at Grafton and backed that up with a last-start fifth at Coffs Harbour behind In The Fine Print when again beaten less than a length.

Raymond Spokes takes the ride on the Mayfield-Smith-prepared Monte Cruise in the O'Brien Plumbing Relining Wayne Glenn Pink Silks Cup Benchmark 82 Handicap (1205m).

Monte Cruise is also a three-time winner from just the nine starts. She hasn't raced since July when finishing last of eight at Eagle Farm and has had two trials at this track in preparation for her return, finishing second behind Saturday's Wyong winner Petticoat before winning the latest of them.

Mayfield-Smith rounds out the day when he again links with Boyd when she rides Cardsharp in the Key Community Group C,G&E Benchmark 58 Handicap (1305m).

hypo_0:
Kandang lokal memburu keuntungan di Coffs dengan empat penantang

Pelatih lokal Noel Mayfield-Smith berharap meraih hari yang menguntungkan pada pertemuan balap Coffs Harbour, Minggu, dengan empat kuda dari kandangnya turun pada kartu enam lomba tersebut.

Pelatih peraih kemenangan Grup 1 itu akan memulai harinya pada lomba kedua ketika Ausbred Yahoo turun dalam Komatsu Country Boosted Benchmark 58 Handicap (1605m) dengan joki magang pengklaim dua kilogram Ella Drew menungganginya.

Balap kembali digelar di Coffs Harbour pada Minggu.

Ausbred Yahoo tampil dalam performa baik dengan finis ketiga di Kempsey tiga start lalu, yang kemudian diikuti dua kali finis kedua berturut-turut di Coffs Harbour, yang terbaru saat dikalahkan rival hari Minggu, Caledonian.

Mayfield-Smith akan kembali bekerja sama dengan joki magang lain, Leanne Boyd, yang mendapat klaim tiga kilogram, ketika Never Island turun dalam Insurance Advisernet Australia Pink Silks F&M Benchmark 58 Handicap (1305m).

Pemenang tiga dari 15 startnya itu, Never Island akan membawa beban 59,5 kilogram setelah pengurangan beban Boyd. Never Island kalah kurang dari satu panjang saat finis kedua di belakang Montgomery di Grafton dan menegaskan performa itu dengan finis kelima pada start terakhir di Coffs Harbour di belakang In The Fine Print, ketika kembali kalah kurang dari satu panjang.

Raymond Spokes akan menunggangi Monte Cruise besutan Mayfield-Smith dalam O'Brien Plumbing Relining Wayne Glenn Pink Silks Cup Benchmark 82 Handicap (1205m).

Monte Cruise juga merupakan pemenang tiga kali dari hanya sembilan start. Ia belum balapan sejak Juli ketika finis terakhir dari delapan peserta di Eagle Farm dan telah menjalani dua uji coba di lintasan ini sebagai persiapan untuk kembali, finis kedua di belakang pemenang Wyong hari Sabtu, Petticoat, sebelum memenangi uji coba terbarunya.

Mayfield-Smith akan menutup harinya ketika kembali bekerja sama dengan Boyd yang akan menunggangi Cardsharp dalam Key Community Group C,G&E Benchmark 58 Handicap (1305m).

Ausbred Yahoo tengah berada dalam performa baik, setelah finis ketiga di Kempsey tiga start lalu, lalu mencatat dua kali finis kedua secara beruntun di Coffs Harbour, yang terbaru saat dikalahkan oleh lawannya pada balapan Minggu ini, Caledonian.

Mayfield-Smith akan berduet dengan joki magang lainnya, Leanne Boyd, pemegang klaim tiga kilogram, saat Never Island turun dalam Insurance Advisernet Australia Pink Silks F&M Benchmark 58 Handicap (1305m).

Pemenang tiga dari 15 start itu, Never Island akan memikul beban 59,5 kilogram setelah pengurangan Boyd. Never Island kalah kurang dari satu panjang saat finis kedua di belakang Montgomery di Grafton, lalu melanjutkannya dengan finis kelima pada start terakhir di Coffs Harbour di belakang In The Fine Print, ketika kembali kalah kurang dari satu panjang.

Raymond Spokes akan menunggangi Monte Cruise, kuda asuhan Mayfield-Smith, dalam O'Brien Plumbing Relining Wayne Glenn Pink Silks Cup Benchmark 82 Handicap (1205m).

Monte Cruise juga merupakan pemenang tiga kali dari hanya sembilan start. Ia belum berlomba lagi sejak Juli, ketika finis terakhir dari delapan peserta di Eagle Farm, dan telah menjalani dua trial di lintasan ini sebagai persiapan untuk kembali tampil, dengan finis kedua di belakang Petticoat, pemenang di Wyong pada Sabtu, sebelum memenangi trial terbarunya.

Mayfield-Smith akan menutup harinya dengan kembali bekerja sama dengan Boyd saat ia menunggangi Cardsharp dalam Key Community Group C,G&E Benchmark 58 Handicap (1305m).

  "landing_page.why_join_company.free.description": "We don't get in the way of you interacting with people and having fun. People can support us for nice to have features.",
  "landing_page.testimonials.description": "Thousands of members have found friendships, a community, love, and much more with us. Here are just a few of their stories:",

  "advertise.why_advertise.content.description": "Here are just a few reasons:",

  "advertise.why_advertise.content.item_3": "You'll have access to a dashboard so you know how your ads are doing 24/7.",
  "advertise.why_advertise.content.item_4": "You can change up your ads throughout the month to keep things fresh.",
  "advertise.how_it_works.content.description": "Rather than selling impressions or clicks, we’ve divided our ad space into equally sized slots:",
  "advertise.how_it_works.content.item_3": "Ads run from the 1st to the last day of the month",
  "advertise.cost.content.description": "A slot starts at $500 USD per month. If you would like to run more than one slot a month, each additional slot starts at $400 USD per month.",
  "advertise.cost.content.note": "Renew by the 15th of the month to guarantee your slots for the next month.",
  "advertise.contact_us.content.description": "If you have any questions or would like to advertise on our website please email us at:",

  "advertise.aside.help_note": "Don't have an ad? We can help you with that. All you have to do is just get into {{link_tag_start}}contact with us{{link_tag_end}}.",
  "advertise.sample_ads.title": "Sample Ads",
  "advertise.sample_ads.cta_label": "view all",
  "welcome.interstitial.slides.intro.heading": "Welcome Home",
  "welcome.interstitial.slides.intro.subheading": "Setting yourself up for success.",
  "welcome.interstitial.slides.intro.pace.heading": "Go at Your Own Pace",
  "welcome.interstitial.slides.intro.consent.description": "You will get the most out of the app by respecting people’s boundaries.",
  "welcome.interstitial.slides.love.description": "Love what you find appealing and interesting. The more you love, the better we can recommend stuff you'll enjoy.",
  "welcome.interstitial.slides.scene.heading": "Find Your Local Scene"
}

That is the Baltic Sea.
Like that thing is the size of my head.
Like shooting from here.
Imagine how hard it would be to hit something with this cannon.
Maybe the best weather.

source_doc:
Reading Gloria Steinem's undercover report on being a Playboy Bunny... finished Part I and damn🤔
Despite being well aware of Playboy being uh... a CORPORATION lol... had no idea how much their entire infrastructure truly served to perpetuate classism in an extremely creepy way while outwardly presenting themselves as the "classy" and thus "more ethical" option compared to say, Hustler

I'll post some screenshots later but to give you the gist, Bunnies (who were cocktail waitresses), had to:
- accept lower (by $200-150, equivalent to today's $2.5K) wages than advertised
- hand over 50% of all their tips
- give their last names to "Number 1 key holders" (ergo, celebrities/elites) if asked
- be subjected to a pelvic exam and blood test but weren't allowed to pick the physician
- be spied on by a private eye
- go out if their way to hide their husbands/bfs

The central point that unites all of this:
Bunnies were STRICTLY NOT ALLOWED TO (penalized by termination) date any other employees or customers... BUT accompanying and dating the "Number 1 key holders" was permitted, if not encouraged. See where this is going?

New recruits were given a "Bunny Bible" to study all those bizarre rules and instructions from.
To mention a few more:
- Bunnies' work performance was assessed by a "merit system" (YES, that exact wording!) instead of being written up. Unsurprisingly, merit was not only judged by a good work ethic but also very specific requirements on looks and attitude.
- there was an incentive system in place that rewarded Bunnies who sold the most liquor and merchandise
instruction: You are a professional Indonesian translator, tasked with providing translations suitable for use in Indonesian (ind_Latn). Your goal is to accurately convey the meaning and nuances of the original text while adhering to Indonesian grammar and vocabulary and ensuring that the translation is natural. The original text is user-generated content from a social media platform. Do not reproduce spelling mistakes. Reproduce marks of expressiveness that communicate meaningful intent (e.g. enthusiasm through capitalisation or elongation) in a way that is natural in Indonesian. Copy URLs and user handles directly rather than translating them. However, translate hashtags as appropriate for the translation to be natural for social media text. Follow the punctuation of the source text as best as possible. Additional punctuation should be added only if not doing so would seriously alter the comprehension of the text. Translate text in an informal style, like close friends talking, even if it changes the original tone. Produce only the Indonesian translation, without any additional explanations or commentary. Maintain the HTML formatting of the original source text. Please translate the following text into Indonesian (ind_Latn):
hypo_0:
Lagi baca laporan penyamaran Gloria Steinem soal jadi Playboy Bunny... baru selesai Bagian I dan anjir🤔
Walau udah sangat sadar kalau Playboy itu, ehm... sebuah KORPORASI lol... sama sekali nggak nyangka kalau seluruh infrastruktur mereka ternyata sebegitunya dibuat buat melanggengkan klasisisme dengan cara yang super creepy, sambil di luar sana menampilkan diri sebagai pilihan yang “berkelas” dan karena itu “lebih etis” dibanding misalnya, Hustler

Nanti aku post beberapa screenshot, tapi biar kebayang intinya, para Bunny (yang kerjanya jadi pramusaji koktail), harus:
- nerima gaji yang lebih rendah ($200-150 lebih kecil, setara sekitar $2.5K sekarang) daripada yang diiklankan
- nyerahin 50% dari semua tip mereka
- ngasih nama belakang mereka ke “pemegang kunci Nomor 1” (alias selebritas/elite) kalau diminta
- harus menjalani pemeriksaan panggul dan tes darah tapi nggak boleh milih dokternya
- dimata-matai detektif swasta
- mati-matian nyembunyiin suami/pacar mereka

Poin utama yang nyambungin semua ini:
Para Bunny SAMA SEKALI NGGAK BOLEH (dan bisa dihukum PHK) pacaran sama pegawai lain atau pelanggan... TAPI menemani dan ngedate sama “pemegang kunci Nomor 1” itu dibolehin, kalau bukan malah didorong. Kelihatan arahnya ke mana, kan?

Rekrutan baru dikasih “Bunny Bible” buat dipelajari, isinya semua aturan dan instruksi aneh itu.
Buat nyebut beberapa lagi:
- performa kerja para Bunny dinilai lewat “sistem merit” (IYA, istilahnya persis gitu!) alih-alih diberi surat peringatan. Nggak mengejutkan, “merit” di sini bukan cuma dinilai dari etos kerja yang bagus, tapi juga dari syarat yang sangat spesifik soal penampilan dan sikap.
- ada sistem insentif yang ngasih penghargaan ke para Bunny yang paling banyak jual minuman keras dan merchandise
hypo_1:
Lagi baca laporan penyamaran Gloria Steinem tentang pengalamannya jadi Playboy Bunny... baru kelar Bagian I dan gila sih🤔
Walaupun gue udah paham banget kalau Playboy itu ya... sebuah KORPORASI lol... gue sama sekali nggak nyangka separah apa seluruh infrastruktur mereka bener-bener berfungsi buat melanggengkan klasisisme dengan cara yang super creepy, sambil di permukaan ngejual diri sebagai opsi yang “berkelas” dan jadi “lebih etis” dibanding, misalnya, Hustler

Nanti gue post beberapa screenshot, tapi biar kebayang garis besarnya, para Bunny (yang kerja sebagai pramusaji koktail) harus:
- menerima upah lebih rendah ($150-200 lebih sedikit, setara sekitar $2.5K sekarang) dari yang diiklankan
- nyetor 50% dari semua tip mereka
- ngasih nama belakang mereka ke “pemegang kunci Nomor 1” (alias selebritas/kaum elite) kalau diminta
- menjalani pemeriksaan panggul dan tes darah, tapi nggak boleh milih dokternya
- dimata-matai detektif swasta

No, because you can't just say you want a divorce after so many years, and then you keep quiet.
Why now?
Why not now?
Tell me why not now?
Out.
Okay, fine.
I'll tell you.

What?
You don't find it so.
No.
Okay.
Tell me, when did we meet?

source_doc:
@rechelon extremely unpopular is one way of putting it… i don’t live in berlin but i think people everywhere had roughly the same response, which is “fuck these assholes for doing something that leaves so many uninvolved people without electricity and treating it like necessary collateral damage”. I’ve seen lots of people speculate that it was a false flag to make the left look bad. Not that the cops care, they are probably giddy with excitement now (a gross thing to imagine) that they have a pretense to raid and criminalize the leftist scene.

@enby_of_the_apocalypse
Yeah, I mean it seems like there's still about half a dozen anticivs raised on meme accounts who are shocked the scene didn't stand with them, but are extremely shocked that old timer anticivs who felt disrespected by said crew and haven't backed them.

@enby_of_the_apocalypse
I do worry that we'll see a self-justification spiral where a handful of anticivs get so mad at the movement for not supporting their super based attack on the civilized that they end up in ITS level shit within a year or two of isolation and seething.

hypo_0:
@rechelon "sangat nggak populer" ya bisa dibilang begitu… aku nggak tinggal di Berlin, tapi kayaknya orang-orang di mana-mana kurang lebih reaksinya sama, yaitu "brengsek banget para bajingan ini udah ngelakuin sesuatu yang bikin begitu banyak orang yang nggak terlibat jadi nggak punya listrik, terus diperlakukan kayak kerugian sampingan yang perlu". Aku lihat banyak orang berspekulasi kalau ini operasi bendera palsu buat bikin kubu kiri kelihatan buruk. Bukan berarti polisi peduli, mereka malah mungkin girang banget sekarang (jijik sih ngebayanginnya) karena mereka jadi punya alasan buat ngegerebek dan mengkriminalisasi scene kiri.

@enby_of_the_apocalypse
Iya, maksudku kayaknya masih ada sekitar setengah lusin anticiv yang kebesaran dari akun meme yang kaget karena scene-nya nggak berdiri bareng mereka, tapi lebih kaget lagi kalau para anticiv lama yang ngerasa diremehkan sama kru itu juga nggak dukung mereka.

@enby_of_the_apocalypse
Aku memang khawatir kita bakal lihat spiral pembenaran diri, di mana segelintir anticiv jadi marah banget ke gerakan itu karena nggak mendukung serangan super keren mereka ke kaum beradab, sampai akhirnya dalam satu atau dua tahun terisolasi dan mendidih sendiri mereka nyemplung ke level kekacauan ala ITS.

How did you know I was going?
I knew it this afternoon.
The way you faced up to him.
Well, I would have told him then.
Except for you.
I thought it would be best if I slipped out this way.
Are you sure you're doing the right thing?
There's nothing else I can do.
Will you.
Will you let me know where you are?
Paul?
As soon as I know myself.

That personality hasn't changed and can't change because that's the world of the show.
There's two of you.
There's Mr. Pickles, and then there's Jeff.

When he's subjected to a personal tragedy, he has to go back to work the next day and still be the same person.
Hey there.
Thump, thump.

Frightening?
Well, he just sits there and grins at me.
I told him he didn't see people without an appointment.
He said, oh, he'll see me.
Just tell him it's an old friend.
Clint, do you know anybody by that name?
Clint.
Clint.
No, it doesn't ring a bell.
All right, send him in.
I'll get rid of him.
Okay.
Don't say I didn't warn you.
Mr. Powell will see you.

source_doc:
Good Morning Worlds!
We are going to the tip this morning. It will clear some of the stuff we sorted yesterday from the drive. I don't think we can clear it all unless we took the trailer, but the trailer is full of steel for weighing in.
Later I might carry on packing tote crates.
#GoodMorningWorlds

Tip trip done, and another car load cleared out.
I have taken the new trailer axle, and trailer drive motor system, out of the scrap metal trailer load. That means we can get more scrap metal in there and also not accidentally weigh in the parts I want to keep.
I think, next, I will start moving the scrap steel from the back garden into the trailer so that it is ready to go.
Scrap steel prices are not very high at the moment but better than nothing, if I take enough of it in one go.
Still have to sort the non-ferrous scrap.

That thing when you are taking the rotten tyres off small, wide lawn tractor wheels....
Huge effort to unmount one side of the tyre, but it was really badly rusted tight on the other side of the rim.
In the time it took me to break the bead free, I'd forgotten I had already done the other side, and ended up with the rim free but completely inside the tyre!
I had to remount the tyre that side, and then work around it to get the rim out.
I had to cut up the inner tube to get that out too!
I wonder how many more tyres I need to unmount? Four done so far.
instruction: You are a professional Indonesian translator, tasked with providing translations suitable for use in Indonesian (ind_Latn). Your goal is to accurately convey the meaning and nuances of the original text while adhering to Indonesian grammar and vocabulary and ensuring that the translation is natural. The original text is user-generated content from a social media platform. Do not reproduce spelling mistakes. Reproduce marks of expressiveness that communicate meaningful intent (e.g. enthusiasm through capitalisation or elongation) in a way that is natural in Indonesian. Copy URLs and user handles directly rather than translating them. However, translate hashtags as appropriate for the translation to be natural for social media text. Follow the punctuation of the source text as best as possible. Additional punctuation should be added only if not doing so would seriously alter the comprehension of the text. Translate text in an informal style, like close friends talking, even if it changes the original tone. Produce only the Indonesian translation, without any additional explanations or commentary. Maintain the HTML formatting of the original source text. Please translate the following text into Indonesian (ind_Latn):
hypo_0:
Selamat Pagi Dunia!
Pagi ini kami mau ke tempat pembuangan. Lumayan buat ngurangin sebagian barang yang kami sortir kemarin dari jalan masuk. Kurasa kami nggak bakal bisa beresin semuanya kecuali kalau bawa trailer, tapi trailernya lagi penuh baja buat ditimbang.
Nanti aku mungkin lanjut ngepak peti tote.
#SelamatPagiDunia

Perjalanan ke tempat pembuangan beres, dan satu muatan mobil lagi berhasil diberesin.
Aku sudah ngeluarin as trailer baru, dan sistem motor penggerak trailer, dari muatan trailer besi rongsokan. Artinya kami bisa masukin lebih banyak besi rongsokan ke sana dan juga nggak bakal nggak sengaja nimbang bagian yang pengin kusimpan.
Kurasa habis ini aku bakal mulai mindahin besi rongsokan dari kebun belakang ke trailer biar siap dibawa pergi.
Harga besi rongsokan lagi nggak terlalu tinggi sekarang, tapi ya lumayan daripada nggak sama sekali, kalau aku bawa cukup banyak sekaligus.
Masih harus sortir rongsokan non-ferrous.

Itu lho rasanya pas lagi ngelepas ban busuk dari roda traktor rumput yang kecil tapi lebar....
Usaha gede banget buat ngelepas satu sisi ban, tapi ternyata sisi satunya benar-benar sudah berkarat parah dan nempel banget di pelek.
Selama aku berusaha ngebebasin bead-nya, aku malah lupa kalau sisi satunya sebenarnya sudah selesai, dan ujung-ujungnya peleknya lepas tapi malah benar-benar ada di dalam ban!
Aku sampai harus masang lagi ban di sisi itu, terus muterin kerjaannya buat ngeluarin peleknya.
Aku juga harus motong ban dalamnya biar bisa ngeluarin itu juga!
Jadi penasaran masih berapa ban lagi yang harus kulepas? Sejauh ini baru empat.

Harga besi rongsokan lagi nggak terlalu tinggi sekarang, tapi tetap lumayan daripada nggak dapat apa-apa, kalau aku bawa cukup banyak sekaligus.
Masih harus nyortir rongsokan non-ferrous.

Itu lho rasanya pas lagi ngelepas ban yang udah busuk dari roda traktor rumput yang kecil tapi lebar....
Tenaga yang keluar gede banget buat ngelepas satu sisi ban, tapi sisi satunya ternyata udah berkarat parah dan nempel banget di pelek.
Selama aku berusaha ngelepas bead-nya, aku malah lupa kalau sisi satunya sebenarnya udah selesai, dan akhirnya peleknya lepas tapi malah benar-benar masuk ke dalam ban!
Aku sampai harus masang lagi ban di sisi itu, terus ngakalin posisinya buat ngeluarin peleknya.
Aku juga harus motong ban dalamnya buat ngeluarin itu!
Jadi penasaran masih ada berapa ban lagi yang harus kulepas? Sejauh ini baru empat.

@ptoothfish why do all of the kids’ IMDb headshots look like they’re screen grabs from This Person Does Not Exist dot com? 😬

@bloodflowersburning yup the whole production machine is giving uncanny valley
even if they are real kids underneath, i wonder how much tuning up their images get 😬
smiles widened, dimples accentuated, etc
i stand by my assertion they will be treated like hot-swappable parts if they do anything complicated like have an opinion or grow into their faces wrong

@ptoothfish oh they absolutely will. There’s probably even some contract clauses that lands them in deep weta if they even sneeze wrong.
instruction: You are a professional Indonesian translator, tasked with providing translations suitable for use in Indonesian (ind_Latn). Your goal is to accurately convey the meaning and nuances of the original text while adhering to Indonesian grammar and vocabulary and ensuring that the translation is natural. The original text is user-generated content from a social media platform. Do not reproduce spelling mistakes. Reproduce marks of expressiveness that communicate meaningful intent (e.g. enthusiasm through capitalisation or elongation) in a way that is natural in Indonesian. Copy URLs and user handles directly rather than translating them. However, translate hashtags as appropriate for the translation to be natural for social media text. Follow the punctuation of the source text as best as possible. Additional punctuation should be added only if not doing so would seriously alter the comprehension of the text. Translate text in an informal style, like close friends talking, even if it changes the original tone. Produce only the Indonesian translation, without any additional explanations or commentary. Maintain the HTML formatting of the original source text. Please translate the following text into Indonesian (ind_Latn):
hypo_0:
@ptoothfish kenapa semua foto profil IMDb anak-anak itu kelihatan kayak screenshot dari This Person Does Not Exist dot com? 😬

@bloodflowersburning yup seluruh mesin produksinya berasa uncanny valley
bahkan kalau memang mereka anak-anak beneran di balik itu, aku jadi penasaran seberapa banyak gambar mereka dipoles 😬
senyumnya dilebarkan, lesung pipinya dibikin makin menonjol, dll
aku tetap yakin mereka bakal diperlakukan kayak komponen yang bisa tukar-pasang kalau mereka ngapa-ngapain yang ribet kayak punya opini atau wajahnya tumbuh “salah”

@ptoothfish oh jelas banget bakal gitu. Mungkin bahkan ada klausul kontrak yang bikin mereka masuk masalah besar kalau sampai mereka bersin dengan cara yang “salah”.

source_doc:
What's the matter with you?
Are you in a trance or something?
You're in the wrong lane.
Oh, I'm sorry.
Helen.
There goes my whole week's salary.
I haven't had a full paycheck since Christmas.
Oh, that's all going to be changed tonight.
But, gee, what if they just say strike and leave us out on a limb?
They won't.
Our demands are reasonable.
Yeah.
If I lose this job, it'll mean pedaling, chewing gum and lead pencils for me.
I ain't a looker.

hypo_0:

Apa kamu lagi bengong atau apa?
Kamu ada di jalur yang salah.
Oh, maaf.
Helen.
Nah, habis sudah gaji semingguku.
Aku belum pernah dapat gaji penuh sejak Natal.
Oh, semua itu bakal berubah malam ini.
Tapi, aduh, gimana kalau mereka cuma bilang mogok dan ninggalin kita begitu saja?
Mereka nggak akan begitu.
Tuntutan kita masuk akal.
Ya.
Kalau aku kehilangan pekerjaan ini, berarti aku harus jualan sambil keliling, permen karet, dan pensil timah.
Aku bukan orang yang enak dipandang.

source_doc:
i am hesitant to declare it but i may be right around the point of behavior calculation optimization where there's nothing more that can be done without actually decimating the number of paths being processed.
And that might actually be the play because things like UCT are smarter about traversing a tree with a budget and splitting how deep vs broad you go

at the end of the day, it's always going to be possible that some enemy picks up some combination of abilities/items where the combinatorial explosion of possibility space is unable to calculate fast on any hardware, so I was always going to need to cap it somewhere, just that theoretical cap is now 40x bigger than it was in january

Welp think I'm going to implement UCT because my game's just Go now this is going to be a journey

source_doc:
I wish alcohol wasn't such a normal gift in society 😅 My employer sent me a bottle of eggnog but the only alcohol we like is in alcohol markers

I guess "not liking it" is kinda poor wording, I just think it's weird how casual we are with this stuff and we somehow just assume that all adults love this shit when there's people who shouldn't be touching it ever, and frankly I think the world would be better off if I poured it into the toilet than even gifting it to someone

@doombloomart
I have had US Big Corp required sensitivity training that reminds people not everyone wants alcohol and it's inappropriate to ask why. Seems like that should be more common

@elithebearded Yeah, that's mostly what I wish for too. I get that with sending random shit to a whole corporation will never be inoffensive to everyone, but 1. don't send random shit to a whole corporation maybe and 2. alcohol just rubs me wrong in the way that many who shouldn't touch it may touch it when it randomly shows up at the doorstep. 😅

hypo_0:
Aku berharap alkohol nggak senormal itu buat dijadiin hadiah di masyarakat 😅 Atasanku ngirimin aku sebotol eggnog, tapi satu-satunya alkohol yang kami suka itu yang ada di spidol alkohol

Kurasa bilang "nggak suka" itu agak kurang pas, aku cuma ngerasa aneh aja gimana santainya kita soal beginian dan entah gimana kita cuma berasumsi semua orang dewasa suka barang beginian, padahal ada orang-orang yang memang nggak boleh nyentuh itu sama sekali, dan sejujurnya menurutku dunia bakal lebih baik kalau aku buang itu ke toilet daripada malah ngasihinnya ke orang lain

@doombloomart
Aku pernah ikut pelatihan sensitivitas wajib dari perusahaan besar AS yang ngingetin orang kalau nggak semua orang mau alkohol dan nggak pantas nanya kenapa. Kayaknya itu memang harus lebih umum

Aku paham kalau ngirim barang random ke seluruh perusahaan nggak bakal bisa nggak nyinggung semua orang, tapi 1. mungkin jangan kirim barang random ke seluruh perusahaan dan 2. alkohol tuh bikin aku nggak nyaman karena banyak orang yang memang nggak seharusnya nyentuh itu bisa aja jadi nyentuh pas barang itu tiba-tiba muncul di depan pintu. 😅

source_doc:
```json
[
  "Set up and manage a Facebook Store right from your Mambalo dashboard. Forget social sharing. You’re ready for social selling.",
  "Easily add, promote, and sell products, or manage all your Facebook advertising in just a few clicks — right from your Mambalo dashboard.",
  "Convert window shoppers to paying customers with Facebook remarketing. With a few clicks, we’ll create hyper-targeted ads to remind your customers about products they considered but didn’t buy.",
  "Sell everywhere",
  "Set up and manage a Facebook store right from your Mambalo dashboard. Forget social sharing. You’re ready for social selling.",
  "Worried about the extra management? Mambalo automatically syncs your product information from your online store with Facebook, so any changes you make will instantly appear in your Facebook ecommerce store. Do it once and forget it.",
  "Advertising your Facebook store — made easy",
  "The Facebook Pixel makes advertising on Facebook much more effective. Easily market to your ideal audiences based on the actions they have taken in your online store and track their conversions. Not only do you know exactly who you’re advertising to, but you also have a better understanding of how your ads are performing. All in all, you can make your messaging more powerful, leading to a better return on your advertising dollars.",
  "Remarket. To everyone who visits your site, or just to people who visit specific pages or take specific actions.",
  "Streamlined shipping and taxes: Integrates with major carriers such as USPS, UPS, FedEx, and many others internationally to automatically calculate shipping rates.",
  "WordPress e-commerce Capabilities: Add your online store to WordPress and showcase the same products, prices, and descriptions on your Facebook store as your WordPress storefront or any other site builder like Weebly, Wix, and Adobe Muse.",
  "E-commerce mobile apps: With Mambalo’s free iOS and Android apps, you can manage sales, track inventory, and accept online payments wherever you are.",
  "PCI DSS validated level 1 service: Provides 55+ payment options and secure HTTPS checkout capabilities to ensure you comply with PCI DSS Level 1 requirements.",
  "Is it possible to migrate my store from WooCommerce to Facebook with Mambalo?",
  "I am still confused and need extra help with the Mambalo Facebook commerce app. What should I do?",
  "Don't forget about our Knowledge Base, either. If you want to learn about Mambalo basics, how to manage your Mambalo Facebook store, and other Mambalo Facebook commerce app topics, our Knowledge Base may prove to be a great resource.",
  "The Mambalo team is happy to help you too. Feel free to send us a message at any time, and we will respond as soon as possible.",
  "Google Smart Shopping takes your products beyond Google search to help you advertise across Shopping, YouTube, Gmail, and the Google Display Network.",
  "Maximize sales without the guesswork",
]
```
instruction: You are a professional Indonesian translator, tasked with providing translations suitable for use in Indonesian (ind_Latn). Your goal is to accurately convey the meaning and nuances of the original text while adhering to Indonesian grammar and vocabulary and ensuring that the translation is natural. The original text is from software data. Translate the content of json, without translating keys and placeholders (i.e. copy them rather than translate them). Produce only the Indonesian translation, without any additional explanations or commentary. Produce a valid json output that matches the input format. Please translate the following text into Indonesian (ind_Latn):
hypo_0: ["Siapkan dan kelola Toko Facebook langsung dari dasbor Mambalo Anda. Lupakan berbagi sosial. Anda siap untuk penjualan sosial.","Tambahkan, promosikan, dan jual produk dengan mudah, atau kelola semua iklan Facebook Anda hanya dalam beberapa klik — langsung dari dasbor Mambalo Anda.","Ubah pengunjung yang hanya melihat-lihat menjadi pelanggan yang membayar dengan remarketing Facebook. Hanya dengan beberapa klik, kami akan membuat iklan yang sangat tertarget untuk mengingatkan pelanggan Anda tentang produk yang mereka pertimbangkan tetapi tidak mereka beli.","Jual di mana saja","Siapkan dan kelola toko Facebook langsung dari dasbor Mambalo Anda. Lupakan berbagi sosial. Anda siap untuk penjualan sosial.","Khawatir tentang pengelolaan tambahan? Mambalo secara otomatis menyinkronkan informasi produk dari toko online Anda dengan Facebook, sehingga setiap perubahan yang Anda buat akan langsung muncul di toko ecommerce Facebook Anda. Lakukan sekali dan lupakan.","Mengiklankan toko Facebook Anda — jadi mudah","Facebook Pixel membuat periklanan di Facebook jauh lebih efektif. Pasarkan dengan mudah kepada audiens ideal Anda berdasarkan tindakan yang mereka lakukan di toko online Anda dan lacak konversinya. Anda tidak hanya mengetahui dengan tepat kepada siapa Anda beriklan, tetapi Anda juga memiliki pemahaman yang lebih baik tentang bagaimana performa iklan Anda. Secara keseluruhan, Anda dapat membuat pesan Anda lebih kuat, yang menghasilkan pengembalian belanja iklan yang lebih baik.","Lakukan remarketing. Kepada semua orang yang mengunjungi situs Anda, atau hanya kepada orang-orang yang mengunjungi halaman tertentu atau melakukan tindakan tertentu.","Pengiriman dan pajak yang disederhanakan: Terintegrasi dengan operator utama seperti USPS, UPS, FedEx, dan banyak lainnya secara internasional untuk menghitung tarif pengiriman secara otomatis.","Kemampuan e-commerce WordPress: Tambahkan toko online Anda ke WordPress dan tampilkan produk, harga, dan deskripsi yang sama di toko Facebook Anda seperti di etalase WordPress Anda atau pembuat situs lainnya seperti Weebly, Wix, dan Adobe Muse.","Aplikasi seluler e-commerce: Dengan aplikasi iOS dan Android gratis dari Mambalo, Anda dapat mengelola penjualan, melacak inventaris, dan menerima pembayaran online di mana pun Anda berada.","Layanan level 1 tervalidasi PCI DSS: Menyediakan 55+ opsi pembayaran dan kemampuan checkout HTTPS yang aman untuk memastikan Anda mematuhi persyaratan PCI DSS Level 1.","Apakah mungkin memigrasikan toko saya dari WooCommerce ke Facebook dengan Mambalo?","Saya masih bingung dan membutuhkan bantuan tambahan dengan aplikasi perdagangan Facebook Mambalo. Apa yang harus saya lakukan?","Jangan lupakan Basis Pengetahuan kami juga. Jika Anda ingin mempelajari dasar-dasar Mambalo, cara mengelola toko Facebook Mambalo Anda, dan topik lain seputar aplikasi perdagangan Facebook Mambalo, Basis Pengetahuan kami bisa menjadi sumber yang sangat bermanfaat.","Tim Mambalo juga dengan senang hati membantu Anda. Jangan ragu untuk mengirimkan pesan kepada kami kapan saja, dan kami akan merespons secepat mungkin.","Google Smart Shopping membawa produk Anda melampaui penelusuran Google untuk membantu Anda beriklan di Shopping, YouTube, Gmail, dan Google Display Network.","Maksimalkan penjualan tanpa tebak-tebakan"]

source_doc:
The hosts took the lead in the 26th minute via the prolific Diaz as the Real Madrid player showed his scoring instinct.

Achraf Hakimi's corner was headed goalwards by Ayoub El Kaabi and Diaz deflected the ball in from close range.

He has now scored in each of Morocco's five games and extends his own record for most goals by a Moroccan at a single Cup of Nations finals, but left the field late on with a heavily strapped thigh that will be a concern for coach Walid Regragui.

Chances were hard to come by for both sides, but Abde Ezzalzouli headed narrowly over the crossbar from another Hakimi corner, while the latter laid on a headed chance for Saibari that was spurned.

Cameroon were unfortunate not to get a penalty kick when Mbeumo was caught in the box as Mauritanian referee Dahane Beida waved play on, while Georges-Kevin Nkoudou headed wide at the back post with the Indomitable Lions' best chance of the game.

Morocco made it 2-0 minutes later to kill off the contest when Saibari was left unmarked at the back post and had time to control the ball and fire low into the far corner of the net.

Ismael Saibari gave Morocco breathing space against Cameroon (REUTERS)

In Friday's other quarter-final, Iliman Ndiaye scored the only goal as Senegal booked an Afcon semi-final berth for the third time in the last four tournaments, beating 10-man Mali 1-0.

Ndiaye netted after 27 minutes, taking advantage of a goalkeeping howler to put Senegal ahead in a tense derby against their west African neighbours.

Mali were reduced to 10 men for the second half after captain Yves Bissouma was sent off for a second caution on the stroke of halftime.

He was booked first for a clumsy challenge in the 25th minute and was dismissed after a needless foul on Idrissa Gana Gueye.

Mali were down to 10 men from the 26th minute of their previous clash against Tunisia and still managed to squeeze through on penalties but there was no recovery this time around against a polished Senegalese outfit.
instruction: You are a professional Indonesian translator, tasked with providing translations suitable for use in Indonesian (ind_Latn). Your goal is to accurately convey the meaning and nuances of the original text while adhering to Indonesian grammar and vocabulary and ensuring that the translation is natural. The original text is a news article. Ensure the translation is formal and consistent with journalistic standards. Produce only the Indonesian translation, without any additional explanations or commentary. Maintain the HTML formatting of the original source text. Please translate the following text into Indonesian (ind_Latn):
hypo_0:
Tuan rumah memimpin pada menit ke-26 melalui Diaz yang tajam, ketika pemain Real Madrid itu menunjukkan naluri mencetak golnya.

Sepak pojok Achraf Hakimi disundul ke arah gawang oleh Ayoub El Kaabi dan Diaz membelokkan bola dari jarak dekat ke dalam gawang.

Ia kini telah mencetak gol dalam masing-masing dari lima pertandingan Maroko dan memperpanjang rekornya sendiri untuk gol terbanyak oleh pemain Maroko dalam satu putaran final Piala Afrika, tetapi meninggalkan lapangan pada akhir laga dengan paha yang dibalut tebal, hal yang akan menjadi kekhawatiran bagi pelatih Walid Regragui.

Peluang sulit didapat bagi kedua tim, tetapi Abde Ezzalzouli menanduk bola tipis di atas mistar dari sepak pojok Hakimi lainnya, sementara yang terakhir menciptakan peluang sundulan untuk Saibari yang gagal dimanfaatkan.

Kamerun tidak beruntung karena tidak mendapatkan tendangan penalti ketika Mbeumo dijatuhkan di kotak penalti saat wasit Mauritania Dahane Beida membiarkan permainan berlanjut, sementara Georges-Kevin Nkoudou menyundul bola melebar di tiang jauh pada peluang terbaik Singa Perkasa dalam pertandingan itu.

Maroko menjadikannya 2-0 beberapa menit kemudian untuk mengunci kemenangan ketika Saibari dibiarkan tanpa kawalan di tiang jauh dan memiliki waktu untuk mengontrol bola serta melepaskan tembakan rendah ke sudut jauh gawang.

Ismael Saibari memberi Maroko ruang bernapas saat melawan Kamerun (REUTERS)

Dalam perempat final lainnya pada Jumat, Iliman Ndiaye mencetak satu-satunya gol ketika Senegal memastikan tempat di semifinal Afcon untuk ketiga kalinya dalam empat turnamen terakhir, dengan mengalahkan Mali yang bermain dengan 10 orang 1-0.

Ndiaye mencetak gol pada menit ke-27, memanfaatkan blunder kiper untuk membawa Senegal unggul dalam derbi yang menegangkan melawan sesama tetangga mereka dari Afrika Barat.

Mali bermain dengan 10 orang pada babak kedua setelah kapten Yves Bissouma diusir keluar lapangan akibat kartu kuning kedua tepat menjelang turun minum.

Ia lebih dahulu menerima kartu kuning karena tekel ceroboh pada menit ke-25 dan kemudian dikeluarkan setelah pelanggaran yang tidak perlu terhadap Idrissa Gana Gueye.

Mali juga bermain dengan 10 orang sejak menit ke-26 dalam pertemuan mereka sebelumnya melawan Tunisia dan masih mampu lolos lewat adu penalti, tetapi kali ini tidak ada kebangkitan melawan tim Senegal yang tampil rapi.
hypo_1:
Tuan rumah unggul pada menit ke-26 lewat Diaz yang produktif, saat pemain Real Madrid itu menunjukkan naluri golnya.

Sepak pojok Achraf Hakimi disundul ke arah gawang oleh Ayoub El Kaabi, dan Diaz membelokkan bola masuk dari jarak dekat.

Ia kini selalu mencetak gol dalam masing-masing dari lima pertandingan Maroko dan memperpanjang rekornya sendiri sebagai pemain Maroko dengan gol terbanyak dalam satu putaran final Piala Afrika, tetapi ia meninggalkan lapangan pada akhir laga dengan paha yang dibebat tebal, yang akan menjadi kekhawatiran bagi pelatih Walid Regragui.

Peluang sulit tercipta bagi kedua tim, tetapi Abde Ezzalzouli menanduk bola tipis di atas mistar gawang dari sepak pojok Hakimi lainnya, sementara Hakimi juga menyodorkan peluang sundulan kepada Saibari yang gagal dimanfaatkan.

Kamerun kurang beruntung tidak mendapat hadiah penalti ketika Mbeumo dilanggar di dalam kotak penalti, sementara wasit asal Mauritania Dahane Beida membiarkan permainan terus berjalan, sedangkan Georges-Kevin Nkoudou menanduk bola melebar di tiang jauh pada peluang terbaik Singa Perkasa dalam pertandingan tersebut.

Maroko menggandakan keunggulan menjadi 2-0 beberapa menit kemudian untuk memastikan kemenangan ketika Saibari dibiarkan tanpa penjagaan di tiang jauh dan sempat mengontrol bola sebelum melepaskan tembakan rendah ke sudut jauh gawang.

Ismael Saibari memberi Maroko kelegaan saat menghadapi Kamerun (REUTERS)

Dalam perempat final lainnya pada Jumat, Iliman Ndiaye mencetak satu-satunya gol saat Senegal memastikan tempat di semifinal Afcon untuk ketiga kalinya dalam empat turnamen terakhir, setelah mengalahkan Mali yang bermain dengan 10 orang 1-0.

Ndiaye mencetak gol pada menit ke-27, memanfaatkan blunder kiper untuk membawa Senegal unggul dalam derbi menegangkan melawan negara tetangga mereka di Afrika Barat.

Mali harus bermain dengan 10 orang pada babak kedua setelah kapten Yves Bissouma diusir keluar lapangan akibat kartu kuning kedua tepat menjelang turun minum.

Ia lebih dulu menerima kartu kuning karena tekel ceroboh pada menit ke-25 dan kemudian diusir setelah melakukan pelanggaran yang tidak perlu terhadap Idrissa Gana Gueye.

Mali juga bermain dengan 10 orang sejak menit ke-26 dalam pertemuan sebelumnya melawan Tunisia dan masih mampu lolos lewat adu penalti, tetapi kali ini mereka tidak mampu bangkit saat menghadapi tim Senegal yang tampil rapi.
hypo_4:
Tuan rumah memimpin pada menit ke-26 melalui Diaz yang sedang tajam, ketika pemain Real Madrid itu menunjukkan insting golnya.

Sepak pojok Achraf Hakimi disundul ke arah gawang oleh Ayoub El Kaabi, lalu Diaz membelokkan bola masuk dari jarak dekat.

Ia kini telah mencetak gol dalam masing-masing dari lima pertandingan Maroko dan memperpanjang rekornya sendiri sebagai pemain Maroko dengan gol terbanyak dalam satu putaran final Piala Afrika, tetapi ia meninggalkan lapangan pada akhir laga dengan paha yang dibalut tebal, sesuatu yang akan mengkhawatirkan pelatih Walid Regragui.

Peluang sulit didapat oleh kedua tim, tetapi Abde Ezzalzouli menanduk bola tipis di atas mistar dari sepak pojok Hakimi lainnya, sementara Hakimi juga menciptakan peluang sundulan untuk Saibari yang gagal dimanfaatkan.

Kamerun bernasib kurang beruntung karena tidak mendapat tendangan penalti ketika Mbeumo dijatuhkan di kotak penalti saat wasit asal Mauritania, Dahane Beida, membiarkan permainan berlanjut, sementara Georges-Kevin Nkoudou menanduk bola melebar di tiang jauh pada peluang terbaik Singa Pantang Menyerah dalam pertandingan itu.

Maroko menggandakan keunggulan menjadi 2-0 beberapa menit kemudian untuk mengunci kemenangan ketika Saibari berdiri tanpa kawalan di tiang jauh dan memiliki waktu untuk mengontrol bola lalu melepaskan tembakan rendah ke sudut jauh gawang.

#valleylink thunk wrong.

source_doc:
On a lighter note, just saw someone complaining about when games beg you to switch to easy mode when you fail.
I also hate this.
I love having an easy mode. Hell, I think games should just fuckin' let you cheat, as long as competitions all have agreed-on rules about it.
But every game that's pestered me into easy mode has been an instant put-down. I have plenty of games to play, if you want me to be done faster, congrats, I'm done faster.

This is what makes modern Marios - modern-ish anyway - so impossible for me to play.
"Did you die thwee times mawwio? Here's the golden supersuit of invincibility because you suck! If you don't want it, just carefully avoid ever pressing anything besides "start level yes again no no nothing else just start the level".
This is also why I stopped trying to play Phantom Pain. Whenever I died, it'd offer me the chicken hat and default to "yes", eventually I forgot to manually say "fuck off".

I get it's a retention thing, but it's so disrespectful.
Autoscaling difficulty also pisses me off, because I'll be gearing up for a challenge and then the game will panic and lower it to super easy because I've been "struggling".
I'll die or something, go back to try again, but nope, now the challenge is gone. You succeeded! You made the game go away! Don't worry, those challenges were for someone else. Someone better.
I can't remember if I ever completed a game with autoscaling difficulty.

I guess the basic difference between me and their target audience is that I like to figure out how to do something, while their target audience - at least in their heads - likes to take a log flume through a Disneyworld attraction.
A little jostling, a little fluids, but don't worry, baby, daddy Walt's got ya. You're safey-wafe, you don't even have to move, just sit there and tee hee, here's a wittle splashy-splash.
If I wanted that, I'd go sit in a fucking dog park and pet a dog.
